footer.tagline: AI-powered client intake for real estate professionals.
index.heroTitle: Your Next Client Intake Runs Itself.
index.heroSubtitle: SoloRealtorAI handles client intake by chat, phone, or website widget — captures every detail about property preferences, timelines, and budget — and delivers a structured lead summary with AI insights — so you're prepared before the first showing.
index.beFirst: Be the first to know when we launch
index.painSubtitle: Solo real estate agents lose leads and commissions to the same three problems every day.
index.painColdBody: A motivated buyer fills out a contact form while you're at a showing. You call back two hours later. They've already booked a tour with another agent. Phone tag kills deals before they start.
index.painZeroBody: You spend the first 15 minutes of every buyer meeting learning basics — budget, timeline, must-haves, pre-approval status — that you could have captured before they ever got in the car.
index.painAfterHoursBody: A relocating family finds your listing at 11pm on a Sunday. They're ready to schedule a tour, have questions about the neighborhood — and there's no way to tell you. They move on to the next agent.
index.featuresTitle: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
index.featuresSubtitle: Six powerful capabilities that transform how solo real estate agents manage new leads.
index.featAiIntakeBody: A branded AI assistant collects every detail you need — via chat, form, or website widget, in English or Spanish — while you focus on your closings.
index.featPhoneBody: A dedicated phone number where buyers and sellers speak naturally with your AI assistant. Every call becomes a structured lead summary — 24/7, no hold music.
index.featSummaryBody: Every intake lands in your inbox as a structured summary with AI-generated context: buyer qualification signals, market timing, and suggested follow-up questions.
index.featDocBody: Request documents from clients, receive secure uploads, and get AI-powered summaries with pre-approval details, disclosure highlights, and transaction-relevant flags.
index.featBriefBody: Every intake generates a deep-dive analysis — market comparables, buyer qualification assessment, neighborhood insights, and suggested showing strategy.
index.featMarketingBody: Generate platform-ready social posts and branded visual cards for Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and Nextdoor — in seconds. Perfect for listings and open houses.
index.howSubtitle: From first login to receiving your first lead — three simple steps.
index.howStep1Desc: Upload your logo, set your assistant's name, add your specializations and intake questions, and get your unique client intake link — in under 10 minutes.
index.howStep2Desc: Add it to your website, email signature, listing pages, or anywhere you connect with buyers and sellers. Your AI handles every conversation — 24/7.
index.howStep3Desc: Get a structured lead summary with AI insights the moment a client submits. Know the budget, the timeline, and the must-haves before you ever schedule a showing.
index.dualTitle: Better for You. Better for Buyers & Sellers.
index.dualSubtitle: When your intake runs smarter, everyone wins — you reclaim your time, and clients get the responsive, prepared experience they deserve.
index.dual1AgentBody: Intake runs 24/7 — nights, weekends, open house days. Every buyer and seller is captured the moment they reach out.
index.dual1ClientTitle: Get a response the moment you're ready
index.dual1ClientBody: No voicemail, no waiting until Monday. Reach out at 11pm when you find the perfect listing and get an immediate, helpful response.
index.dual2AgentBody: Structured intake with budget, timeline, property preferences, and pre-approval status — no scribbled notes, no missed details, no 15-minute fact-finding at the first meeting.
index.dual2ClientBody: No intimidating forms. A warm, helpful conversation that feels like talking to a real person — so you can explain exactly what you're looking for.
index.dual3AgentTitle: Walk into every meeting fully prepared
index.dual3AgentBody: AI-generated lead brief with buyer qualification signals, property preference analysis, and suggested listings to discuss — before you ever meet in person.
index.dual3ClientTitle: Your agent already understands what you need
index.dual3ClientBody: No repeating yourself. Your first real conversation starts where it should — with curated listings, strategy, and next steps.
index.dual4AgentBody: Spend your time on showings, negotiations, and closings — not copying intake notes from voicemail or chasing down basic client preferences.
index.dual4ClientTitle: A faster path to your next home
index.dual4ClientBody: From "we're looking for a house" to a prepared, personalized showing — faster than you thought possible. The expertise of a top-producing team with the personal attention of a solo agent.
index.dualTagline: Great client relationships start before the first showing.

index.closingTitle: Your lead pipeline runs while you're at a showing.
index.closingSubtitle: Stop losing buyers and sellers to missed calls and after-hours gaps. Chat, phone, and document intake — always on, always branded, always ready.
features.pageTitle: Built for the Solo Real Estate Agent
features.pageSubtitle: Intake by chat, phone, or widget. AI document analysis. Marketing tools. Everything you need — without adding overhead or hiring staff.
features.intakeDesc: Buyers and sellers get a conversational AI intake or a structured form — in English or Spanish. You get the details you need. No phone tag, no back-and-forth, no scheduling required on your end.
features.intakeBullet1: Conversational AI chat mode and structured form mode
features.intakeBullet2: Give your AI assistant a name — clients meet "Sage" or "Parker," not a generic bot
features.intakeBullet3: Bilingual — clients choose English or Spanish at the start
features.intakeBullet4: Fully customizable intake questions tailored to your specialization
features.intakeBullet5: Your disclaimer presented to every client before they begin
features.intakeBullet6: Your logo, business name, and greeting — clients never see SoloRealtorAI
features.summaryTitle: Know the Client Before the First Meeting
features.summaryDesc: Every submission arrives with a structured lead summary and AI-generated context notes — flagging buyer qualification signals, market timing considerations, neighborhood fit, and suggested follow-up questions — so you're prepared the moment you pick up the phone.
features.summaryBullet1: Organized client profile: name, contact, location, and property preferences
features.summaryBullet2: AI contextual notes — qualification signals, market analysis, and listing suggestions — for your eyes only
features.summaryBullet3: Suggested follow-up questions tailored to the transaction type
features.summaryBullet4: Delivered to your inbox the moment intake is submitted
features.summaryBullet5: Client receives a clean, branded confirmation with their submission summary
features.phoneDesc: Give your business a dedicated phone number where callers speak naturally with your AI assistant. No hold music, no phone trees — just a professional conversation that captures every detail and delivers the same structured summary as chat intake.
features.phoneBullet1: Dedicated local phone number for your business
features.phoneBullet2: Callers speak naturally — your AI assistant guides the conversation
features.phoneBullet3: Same structured summary, AI context notes, and email notifications
features.phoneBullet4: Available 24/7 — never miss an after-hours or weekend call
features.phoneBullet5: Intake source clearly labeled (Web Chat vs. Phone Call) in your portal
features.docDesc: Request documents from clients with one click. AI recommends what to ask for based on the transaction type, clients upload securely, and every document is automatically analyzed — key dates, findings, red flags, and a transaction-relevant summary — ready for your review.
features.docBullet1: AI recommends documents based on transaction type and property details
features.docBullet2: Clients upload securely via a branded, encrypted portal
features.docBullet3: AI extracts key dates, findings, and transaction-relevant highlights from each document
features.docBullet4: Handles PDFs, images, scanned documents, and Word files
features.docBullet5: 30-day secure retention — pass-through, not a vault
features.docBullet6: No human ever views client documents — fully automated
features.briefDesc: Every intake automatically generates a deep-dive analysis that goes beyond summarizing what the client said. The Intelligence Brief identifies buyer qualification signals, market comparable analysis, neighborhood fit scoring, and suggests the follow-up questions that matter most — so you walk into every meeting with the insight of a top-producing team.
features.briefBullet1: Buyer qualification assessment — budget-to-market alignment, pre-approval strength, and motivation signals
features.briefBullet2: Market comparable analysis with price range positioning and inventory availability
features.briefBullet3: Neighborhood and school district matching based on stated preferences
features.briefBullet4: Suggested follow-up questions tailored to the specific transaction
features.briefBullet5: Delivered alongside the intake summary — no extra step required
features.brandDesc: Clients never see "SoloRealtorAI." They see your business name, your logo, and your intake page — at a URL you control. Every detail is configurable from your admin portal, and when they're ready to meet, send a one-click scheduling invite.
features.brandBullet2: Upload your logo — shown on every client-facing screen and email
features.brandBullet3: Set your assistant's name, client greeting, and specialization focus
features.brandBullet4: Configure disclaimers in English and Spanish
features.brandBullet5: Pause intake instantly with a custom unavailability message
features.brandBullet6: Send showing invites via Calendly or any scheduling link
features.marketingDesc: The Marketing Kit generates platform-ready social media posts and professionally branded visual cards in seconds — tailored to your listings, your open houses, and your intake link. No designer. No copywriter. No extra tools.
features.marketingBullet1: AI-written post copy for Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and Nextdoor
features.marketingBullet2: Branded visual cards pre-sized for every platform — download as PNG, ready to upload
features.marketingBullet3: Edit the card headline (AI-suggested, fully customizable) to match your voice
features.marketingBullet4: 5 color themes — or use your brand color pulled automatically from your logo
features.marketingBullet5: Website banner sizes included for your business website
features.marketingBullet6: Generate in English or Spanish — bilingual from the start
features.integrationsTitle: Connect to the Tools You Already Use
features.integrationsDesc: Every completed intake can automatically flow to your CRM, your spreadsheets, your project management tools — wherever you need it. No copy-pasting, no manual data entry, no switching between tabs.
features.intBullet1: **HubSpot CRM** — connect your free HubSpot account and every intake automatically creates a contact with full details and AI context notes
features.intBullet2: **Zapier & Make** — add a webhook URL and every intake fires to 6,000+ apps: Google Sheets, Slack, Mailchimp, and more
features.intBullet3: **Custom webhooks** — send intake data to any endpoint with HMAC-signed payloads for security
features.intBullet4: **Calendly** — send one-click consultation invites with personalized booking links
features.intBullet5: Connect and disconnect in seconds — no developer required
features.blogTitle: AI Blog Posts That Bring Clients to You
features.blogDesc: Generate SEO-optimized blog posts tailored to your brokerage, your specialties, and your market — in seconds. Each post comes with a title, article, meta description, keywords, and a ready-to-post social media teaser. Content marketing without the content struggle.
features.blogBullet1: AI-suggested topics based on your market and specialty
features.blogBullet2: Full SEO-optimized article (600-800 words) with meta description and keywords
features.blogBullet3: Social media teaser ready to post on any platform
features.blogBullet5: Copy any section with one click — paste directly to your website or social
features.transcriptDesc: Every intake conversation — chat or phone — is preserved as a complete transcript. See exactly what your client said, how the AI guided the conversation, and review the full context before the showing or consultation. Nothing gets lost in translation.
features.transcriptBullet1: Full chat bubble view of every conversation
features.transcriptBullet2: Chat and phone intake transcripts in one place
features.transcriptBullet3: Review before the meeting — see exactly what the buyer or seller described
features.transcriptBullet4: Source label: Web Chat vs. Phone Call
features.adminDesc: Review every submission, track status, manage documents, and triage your lead pipeline in one place.
features.adminBullet4: Chat and phone intake unified view
features.emailDesc: You and your client both get a confirmation the moment an intake is submitted.
features.securityDesc: Enterprise-grade security with AI-powered data boundary enforcement.
features.securityBullet1: AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS in transit
features.securityBullet2: AI detects and blocks SSN, credit card, and government ID data in real time
features.securityBullet3: No human review — fully automated AI processing
benefits.heroTitle: Better for You. Better for Buyers & Sellers.
benefits.heroSubtitle: When your intake runs smarter, everyone wins. You reclaim your time and walk into every meeting prepared. Your clients get the responsive, professional experience they deserve — from the very first interaction.
benefits.journeySubtitle: Follow a client from first contact to first showing — and see how every step creates value for both sides.
benefits.j1AgentBody: Intake runs 24/7 — nights, weekends, open house days. Every buyer and seller is captured the moment they reach out. No more lost leads to voicemail or after-hours gaps.
benefits.j1ClientTitle: Get a response the moment you're ready
benefits.j1ClientBody: No voicemail, no waiting until Monday. Reach out at 11pm on a Sunday when you find the perfect listing and get an immediate, helpful response. Your home search starts on your schedule.
benefits.j2AgentBody: Structured intake with all the facts you need — no scribbled notes, no missed details, no 20-minute fact-finding calls. Every answer organized and ready for review.
benefits.j2ClientBody: No intimidating forms. A warm, helpful conversation that feels like talking to a real person — in English or Spanish. Describe your dream home at your own pace.
benefits.j3AgentTitle: Walk into every meeting fully prepared
benefits.j3AgentBody: AI-generated lead brief with buyer qualification signals, property preference analysis, and suggested listings — before you ever schedule a showing. Know the client, the budget, and the right questions.
benefits.j3ClientTitle: Your agent already understands what you need
benefits.j3ClientBody: No repeating yourself. No starting from zero. Your first real conversation starts where it should — with curated listings, market insights, and next steps.
benefits.j4AgentBody: Spend your time on showings, negotiations, and closings — not copying intake notes from voicemail or chasing down basic client preferences. Focus on selling real estate.
benefits.j4ClientTitle: A faster path to your next home
benefits.j4ClientBody: From 'we're looking for a house' to a prepared, personalized showing — faster than you thought possible. The expertise of a top-producing team with the personal attention of a solo agent.
benefits.featuresSubtitle: Beyond the intake journey, every capability in SoloRealtorAI creates a ripple effect — making your business more efficient and your clients' experience more professional.
benefits.bilingualAgent: Serve Spanish-speaking buyers and sellers without hiring bilingual staff or paying for translation services.
benefits.bilingualClient: Communicate in the language you're most comfortable in — from the very first interaction.
benefits.phoneIntakeAgent: A dedicated phone line that handles intake calls 24/7. Same structured summary, zero phone tag.
benefits.phoneIntakeClient: Prefer talking over typing? Call anytime and speak naturally — no hold music, no phone trees.
benefits.docIntelAgent: AI analyzes uploaded pre-approval letters, disclosures, inspection reports, and HOA documents — extracting key details and flags before you review.
benefits.docIntelClient: A simple, secure way to share what's needed. Clear checklist, encrypted upload, no confusion.
benefits.triageAgent: Color-coded aging, buyer motivation signals, and timeline urgency flags so you prioritize hot leads first.
benefits.triageClient: Time-sensitive situations get flagged and fast-tracked. Your urgent relocation or competitive offer gets the attention it deserves.
benefits.privSecAgent: End-to-end encryption, financial data protection, and 30-day document retention with deletion rights.
benefits.privSecClient: Your financial information and personal details are protected from the start. Fully automated, fully encrypted.
benefits.widgetAgent: One line of code embeds intake directly on your WordPress or any website. Capture leads where they already are — on your listings and landing pages.
benefits.widgetClient: Start your intake without leaving your agent's website. No new tabs, no separate portals, no friction.
benefits.aiBriefAgent: Every intake generates a deep-dive analysis — buyer qualification, market comparables, neighborhood matching, and the follow-up questions that matter most.
benefits.aiBriefClient: Your agent spots opportunities specific to your budget, timeline, and preferences — not just the one listing you asked about. Nothing falls through the cracks.
benefits.marketingKitAgent: Generate branded social posts and visual cards for Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, and Nextdoor in seconds — perfect for new listings and open house announcements.
benefits.marketingKitClient: Find your agent where you already browse — on social media, local directories, and community boards. One click starts your intake.
benefits.crmAgent: Connect HubSpot (free) and every completed intake automatically creates a contact with full details and AI context notes. Zero manual data entry.
benefits.crmClient: Your agent has your information organized and ready before your first showing. Faster follow-ups, fewer repeat questions.
benefits.zapierAgent: Send intake data to Google Sheets, Slack, Mailchimp, or any of 6,000+ apps automatically. Build the workflow that fits your business.
benefits.zapierClient: Your submission triggers the right actions immediately — appointment scheduling, welcome emails, or follow-up reminders — without anyone manually pushing buttons.
benefits.blogGenAgent: Generate SEO-optimized blog posts tailored to your specialties and location. Each post comes with title, article, keywords, and a social media teaser — content marketing without the struggle.
benefits.blogGenClient: Find helpful, expert real estate content from a local agent you can trust — not generic internet advice. When you're ready, your agent is one click away.
benefits.bottomBody: Solo real estate agents don't have a team of assistants handling calls, intake coordinators, or 24/7 answering services. Your clients don't know that — and with SoloRealtorAI, they'll never need to. Every interaction feels like a top-producing team with the personal attention only a solo agent can provide.
benefits.bottomTagline: Great client relationships start before the first showing.

pricing.trialNote: All plans include a 14-day free trial with full access to all features. Your card is required at signup but you won't be charged until day 15.
pricing.faq1Q: What's included in the free trial?
pricing.faq1A: Your 14-day free trial gives you full access to everything — including the Marketing Kit. A credit card is required at signup, but you won't be charged until day 15.
pricing.faq2A: Each completed client intake submission counts as one intake — whether through AI chat, structured form, or phone call. Incomplete sessions do not count. Limits reset monthly.
pricing.faq3Q: How does the AI phone intake line work?
pricing.faq3A: Pro+ includes a dedicated local phone number. When a buyer or seller calls, they speak naturally with your AI assistant — no hold music, no phone trees. Every call produces a structured lead summary with AI insights, delivered to your inbox. Available 24/7.
pricing.faq4A: Yes. Upgrade anytime with prorated billing. Downgrades take effect at your next billing period.
pricing.faq5Q: Is this only for solo agents?
pricing.faq5A: SoloRealtorAI is designed for solo agents and small teams. Each account is tied to one agent, one branded intake link, and one inbox. Multi-agent teams can each set up individual accounts.
pricing.faq6A: Yes. Cancel anytime from your account settings. Access continues through the end of your billing period. No cancellation fees.
pricing.readySubtitle: SoloRealtorAI is coming Q2 2026. Join the waitlist to be first in line.
faq.pageSubtitle: Everything you need to know about SoloRealtorAI — how it works, what's included, and how to get the most out of it.
faq.how1Q: How does the AI client intake work?
faq.how1A: When a buyer or seller visits your unique intake link, they're guided through a conversational intake experience powered by an AI assistant. The AI asks questions about their property preferences, timeline, budget, pre-approval status, and any specific needs. Clients respond naturally in their own words, and the system structures their answers into a clean lead summary delivered to your inbox.
faq.how2Q: What happens after a client submits an intake?
faq.how2A: Two things happen automatically. You receive a detailed email with the client's contact info, property preferences, timeline, and budget — plus AI-generated market insights visible only to you. The client receives a confirmation email summarizing what they submitted. All submissions are stored in your admin portal.
faq.how3Q: Does the AI assistant give real estate advice?
faq.how3A: No. The AI assistant is strictly an intake tool — it collects information on your behalf. It doesn't provide property valuations, market predictions, or guidance on how a client should proceed. All AI-generated notes are internal aids for your eyes only.
faq.how4Q: Does it handle both buyers and sellers?
faq.how4A: Yes. Your AI assistant adapts its questions based on whether the client is buying or selling. Buyers are asked about property preferences, budget, pre-approval, and timeline. Sellers are asked about their property details, motivation, timeline, and pricing expectations. Both paths deliver structured summaries to your inbox.
faq.how5Q: Does SoloRealtorAI support languages other than English?
faq.how5A: Yes. Full bilingual support for English and Spanish. Clients select their preferred language at the start. The entire intake — AI conversation, form fields, and confirmation email — is delivered in their chosen language. Your notification emails are always in English.
faq.setup1A: Most agents are fully set up within 10 minutes. Enter your name and brokerage, upload your logo, select your specializations, write a custom greeting, add any custom intake questions, and connect your scheduling link. Your branded intake is live immediately.
faq.setup2Q: Can I customize the intake questions?
faq.setup2A: Yes, fully. In addition to core fields (name, contact info, property preferences, timeline, budget), you can add unlimited custom questions — neighborhood preferences, must-have features, deal-breakers, or anything specific to your market. Custom questions appear in both the AI chat and the structured form.
faq.setup3Q: Can I connect my scheduling link?
faq.setup3A: Yes. Connect Calendly directly or paste any scheduling URL (Acuity, Google Booking, etc.). Clients who complete an intake can automatically receive a scheduling email to book a showing or consultation.
faq.billing1Q: Do you offer a free trial?
faq.billing1A: Yes. Every new account starts with a 14-day free trial. A credit card is required to start, but you won't be charged until the trial ends.
faq.billing2Q: What is the difference between plans?
faq.billing2A: Both Starter and Pro include the full intake system. Starter ($49/month) supports up to 50 intakes. Pro ($79/month) adds the Marketing Kit and 150 intakes. Pro+ ($119/month) adds unlimited intakes, AI phone line, and Document Intelligence.
faq.sec1A: Yes. All data is encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest (AES-256). Client data is scoped to your account — no data is shared across accounts or used to train AI models.
faq.support1Q: Is SoloRealtorAI only for solo agents?
faq.support1A: SoloRealtorAI is built for solo agents and small teams. Each account is tied to one agent, one branded intake link, and one inbox. Agents on a team can each set up their own individual account.
faq.support2A: Reach us at sean@solosolutionsai.com. We respond within one business day. You can also use the <1>contact form.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1p1: SoloSolutionsAI ("we," "our," or "us") operates a multi-vertical client intake automation platform serving solo practitioners and small businesses across multiple professions, including but not limited to: attorneys, therapists, social workers, veterinarians, realtors, accountants, insurance agents, and travel advisors. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard information when you use our platform at app.solosolutionsai.com and associated services (collectively, the "Service").
privacy.s1p2: This policy applies to all users of the Service, including professionals who create accounts ("Professionals") and their clients who submit information through intake conversations ("Clients").
privacy.s2_1Body: When a professional creates an account, we collect: full name, email address, business name, office city and state, phone number, profession/vertical, service areas or specialties, and optional business logo. Professionals may also configure: AI assistant name, client greeting, disclaimers (English and Spanish), intake questions, and scheduling preferences.
privacy.s2_2Body: Information submitted by clients through AI-powered chat conversations or phone intake includes: full name, email address, phone number (optional — clients may decline), city and state, primary concern or reason for inquiry, desired outcome, contact preference, and responses to profession-specific intake questions configured by the professional.
privacy.s2_3Body: Full transcripts of intake conversations (both chat and phone) are stored and made available to the professional through their admin portal. Transcripts include all messages exchanged between the client and the AI assistant during the intake session.
privacy.s2_4Body: When a client uploads documents at the request of their professional, we collect the document files, file names, file types, and file sizes. Documents may include records, correspondence, identification, or other materials relevant to the client's matter. Providing documents is entirely voluntary.
privacy.s2_5Body: We collect standard technical information including: IP address, browser type, device type, pages visited, time spent, referring URLs, and similar analytics data through Google Analytics 4. This data is used to improve the Service and is not linked to individual client intake records.
privacy.s3p1: SoloSolutionsAI employs active data boundary enforcement. Our system is architecturally designed to detect and block the following categories of sensitive information in real time during intake conversations:
privacy.s3b1: Social Security Numbers (SSN) — detected and redacted automatically
privacy.s3b2: Credit card numbers — detected and redacted automatically
privacy.s3b3: Bank account and routing numbers — detected and redacted automatically
privacy.s3b4: Government-issued ID numbers — detected and blocked
privacy.s3p2: If a client volunteers any of this information during an intake conversation, the system detects the pattern, redacts the data from the transcript, does not store it, and gracefully redirects the conversation. This protection operates at the infrastructure level, not the policy level — meaning the system is structurally incapable of retaining this data, regardless of user input.
privacy.s4b1: Provide, operate, and maintain the Service
privacy.s4b2: Process client intake submissions and deliver them to the appropriate professional
privacy.s4b3: Generate AI-powered intake summaries, context notes, and intelligence briefs
privacy.s4b4: Analyze uploaded documents using AI to produce structured summaries for the professional
privacy.s4b5: Send email notifications about new intake submissions to professionals and confirmation emails to clients
privacy.s4b6: Generate AI-powered marketing content (blog posts, social media copy) at the professional's request
privacy.s4b7: Sync intake data to third-party services (HubSpot, Zapier, webhooks) when configured by the professional
privacy.s4b8: Provide consultation scheduling functionality via Calendly integration
privacy.s4b9: Monitor platform health and performance via internal analytics
privacy.s5intro: SoloSolutionsAI integrates with third-party services. Data is shared with these services only when explicitly configured by the professional. We do not sell, rent, or share client data with third parties for their own marketing purposes.
privacy.s5_1Body: When a professional connects their HubSpot account via OAuth, completed intake data (client name, email, phone, location, primary concern, desired outcome, contact preference, and AI context summary) is automatically sent to HubSpot to create or update a contact record. Data flows one way: from SoloSolutionsAI to HubSpot. The professional's HubSpot account is governed by HubSpot's own privacy policy and terms.
privacy.s5_2Body: Professionals may configure webhook URLs that receive intake data when a client completes an intake. The data payload includes: client name, email, phone, location, primary concern, desired outcome, contact preference, intake source, and vertical. Webhook payloads are signed with HMAC-SHA256 when a signing secret is configured. The professional is solely responsible for the security and privacy practices of their webhook endpoints and connected services.
privacy.s5_3Body: When a professional connects Calendly, we store OAuth tokens to facilitate consultation invite emails. We do not access or store Calendly appointment data beyond the scheduling URL and event type.
privacy.s5_4Body: We use Anthropic (Claude) for AI-powered intake conversations, context summaries, intelligence briefs, document analysis, and blog post generation. Our AI provider does not retain, store, or use your data to train AI models. Data is processed in real time and discarded by the provider after the response is generated.
privacy.s5_5Body: Transactional emails (intake notifications, client confirmations, document requests) are sent via Resend. Email content is transmitted securely and is not stored by the email provider beyond delivery.
privacy.s5_6Body: We use Google Analytics 4 to collect anonymized usage data on our marketing websites and platform. Analytics data is not linked to individual client intake records.
privacy.s6intro: We implement robust technical and organizational security measures to protect your information:
privacy.s6b1: All data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.2+ and at rest using AES-256 encryption
privacy.s6b2: Database access is governed by Row Level Security (RLS) policies — professionals can only access their own data
privacy.s6b3: Client document storage uses private, encrypted buckets with access-controlled policies
privacy.s6b4: No employee, contractor, or representative of SoloSolutionsAI views, reads, or reviews client intake data or uploaded documents — all processing is fully automated
privacy.s6b5: API rate limiting is enforced to prevent abuse
privacy.s6b6: CORS policies restrict access to authorized domains only
privacy.s6b7: Integration tokens (HubSpot, Calendly) are encrypted and stored securely
privacy.s7p1: Professional accounts: Account information is retained for as long as your account is active. You may request account deletion at any time.
privacy.s7p2: Client intake records: Intake submissions, conversation transcripts, and AI-generated summaries are retained unless the professional or client requests deletion. Professionals can manage and delete intake records from their admin portal.
privacy.s7p3: Uploaded documents: Client-uploaded documents and their AI-generated summaries are automatically deleted from our systems 30 days after upload. SoloSolutionsAI is designed as a pass-through service, not a permanent document repository. Professionals are responsible for downloading and retaining any documents they need within this window.
privacy.s7p4: Integration data: OAuth tokens for connected services (HubSpot, Calendly) are retained until the professional disconnects the integration. Data that has been synced to third-party services is governed by those services' retention policies.
privacy.s7p5: Right to deletion: Clients may request immediate deletion of their data, including intake records and uploaded documents, at any time by contacting privacy@solosolutionsai.com. Upon receiving a valid request, we will delete the relevant data from our systems. Note: data already synced to third-party services (HubSpot, webhooks) must be deleted by the professional from those services directly.
privacy.s8intro: SoloSolutionsAI serves professionals across multiple regulated and unregulated industries. The following considerations apply:
privacy.s8_1Body: SoloSolutionsAI is a software tool only. Use of the Service does not create an attorney-client relationship. Attorneys are responsible for ensuring their use of the platform complies with applicable rules of professional conduct, ethics rules, and client confidentiality requirements in their jurisdiction. Data retention requirements vary by state bar — attorneys should download and retain intake records according to their jurisdictional requirements.
privacy.s8_2Body: The Service is designed for initial client onboarding and lead capture — not for clinical documentation, treatment planning, or session notes. The AI intake conversation does not constitute a therapeutic session. Therapists and counselors are responsible for ensuring their use of the platform complies with applicable licensing board requirements and patient confidentiality obligations. The Service is not intended to be HIPAA-compliant and should not be used to collect protected health information (PHI) as defined by HIPAA.
privacy.s8_3Body: Social workers using the Service should ensure compliance with the NASW Code of Ethics regarding client confidentiality and informed consent. The Service supports initial intake and inquiry capture — it is not a case management system.
privacy.s8_4Body: The Service captures initial client/patient owner information for onboarding purposes. It is not an electronic health records (EHR) system and should not be used to store medical records, diagnoses, or treatment plans. AI-generated intelligence briefs are informational tools and do not constitute medical or veterinary diagnosis.
privacy.s8_5Body: Accountants and insurance professionals are responsible for ensuring compliance with applicable financial privacy regulations. Our data boundary enforcement actively blocks collection of financial account numbers, Social Security Numbers, and other sensitive financial identifiers during intake.
privacy.s8_6Body: Regardless of profession, all professionals using SoloSolutionsAI are solely responsible for ensuring their use of the platform complies with applicable laws, regulations, professional standards, and ethical codes in their jurisdiction. SoloSolutionsAI provides a technology platform — it does not provide legal, medical, financial, or professional advice of any kind.
privacy.s9intro: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:
privacy.s9b1: Access: Request a copy of the personal information we hold about you
privacy.s9b3: Deletion: Request deletion of your personal information
privacy.s9b4: Portability: Request your data in a structured, machine-readable format
privacy.s9b5: Objection: Object to processing of your information for certain purposes
privacy.s9b6: Restriction: Request that we limit how we use your information
privacy.s9b7: Withdrawal of consent: Withdraw consent at any time where processing is based on consent
privacy.s9p1: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@solosolutionsai.com. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy.s10intro: We comply with applicable US state privacy laws, including:
privacy.s10b1: California (CCPA/CPRA): California residents have the right to know what personal information is collected, request deletion, and opt out of the sale of personal information. We do not sell personal information.
privacy.s10b2: Virginia (VCDPA), Colorado (CPA), Connecticut (CTDPA): Residents of these states have similar rights to access, correction, deletion, and portability of their personal information.
privacy.s10p1: We do not sell, share for cross-context behavioral advertising, or use personal information for profiling in furtherance of decisions that produce legal or similarly significant effects.
privacy.s11intro: SoloSolutionsAI is operated by SPD Digital Consulting LLC, based in the United States. All data is currently stored and processed in the United States (AWS US-East-1 region via Supabase).
privacy.s11_1p1: For users in the United Kingdom, personal data is transferred to the United States under the UK-US Data Bridge framework, which provides adequate safeguards for the transfer of personal data from the UK to certified US organizations. We process personal data based on: (a) contractual necessity — to provide the Service you have requested; (b) legitimate interests — to operate, maintain, and improve our platform; or (c) your explicit consent.
privacy.s11_1p2: Your rights under UK GDPR include: access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, objection to processing, and the right to lodge a complaint with the Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) at ico.org.uk.
privacy.s11_2Body: For users in the EEA, personal data is transferred to the United States under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework. You have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority. The same lawful bases and data subject rights described in Section 11.1 apply.
privacy.s11_3Body: All data is currently stored in the United States. We are evaluating regional data residency options (including UK-based storage) for future availability. If you have specific data residency requirements, please contact us at privacy@solosolutionsai.com.
privacy.s11p1: By using the Service, you acknowledge and consent to the transfer and processing of your information in the United States in accordance with this Privacy Policy and applicable data transfer frameworks.
privacy.s12Body: The Service is not intended for individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have inadvertently collected information from a minor, please contact us immediately at privacy@solosolutionsai.com.
privacy.s13Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify registered professionals of material changes by email and by posting the updated policy on this page with a revised "Last Updated" date. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.s14intro: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, wish to exercise your rights, or have concerns about our data practices, please contact us at:
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: By accessing or using SoloSolutionsAI ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the Service. These Terms apply to all users, including professionals who create accounts ("Professionals") and individuals who submit information through intake conversations ("Clients").
terms.s2Body: SoloSolutionsAI provides an AI-powered client intake and onboarding platform for solo practitioners and small businesses across multiple professions. The Service includes: conversational AI intake (chat and phone), AI-generated summaries and intelligence briefs, email notifications, client submission management, document upload and AI analysis, marketing content generation (blog posts, social media copy, visual cards), third-party integrations (HubSpot CRM, Zapier, webhooks, Calendly), and website widget embedding.
terms.s3intro: To use the Service as a Professional, you must:
terms.s3b1: Be a licensed, certified, or qualified professional in your field (where applicable)
terms.s3b2: Provide accurate and complete registration information
terms.s3b3: Maintain the security of your account credentials
terms.s3b4: Be responsible for all activities under your account
terms.s3b5: Promptly update your account information if it changes
terms.s3p1: You may not create an account on behalf of another person or entity without their authorization. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that contain false or misleading information.
terms.s4_1Body: The Service is offered in multiple subscription tiers (Starter, Pro, and Pro+), each with different feature access levels and usage limits. Current pricing and feature details are available on our pricing page. We reserve the right to modify pricing with 30 days' advance notice.
terms.s4_2Body: All plans include a 14-day free trial with full Pro+ access. You will not be charged until your trial ends. If you do not select a paid plan before the trial expires, your account will be moved to the Starter tier.
terms.s4_3Body: Payments are processed securely through Stripe. By subscribing to a paid plan, you authorize us to charge your payment method on a recurring basis. You are responsible for keeping your payment information current.
terms.s4_4Body: You may cancel your subscription at any time. Upon cancellation, your access continues through the end of your current billing period. No prorated refunds are issued for partial billing periods. You may manage your subscription through the Stripe Customer Portal accessible from your account settings.
terms.s5b1: Use the Service for any illegal purpose or in violation of any applicable laws or regulations
terms.s5b2: Submit, collect, or store information that you are not authorized to collect
terms.s5b3: Attempt to circumvent data boundary enforcement mechanisms (e.g., intentionally collecting prohibited data types such as Social Security Numbers, credit card numbers, or government IDs through modified intake questions)
terms.s5b4: Use the Service to send spam, unsolicited communications, or harass individuals
terms.s5b5: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Service, other accounts, or related systems
terms.s5b6: Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble any part of the Service
terms.s5b7: Resell, redistribute, or sublicense the Service without our written consent
terms.s5b8: Use the Service in a manner that could damage, disable, or impair our infrastructure
terms.s5b9: Use AI-generated content (blog posts, marketing copy) in a misleading or deceptive manner
terms.s5b10: Misrepresent AI-generated summaries or intelligence briefs as your own professional analysis
terms.s6_1Body: SoloSolutionsAI uses artificial intelligence (powered by Anthropic Claude) to conduct intake conversations, generate summaries, produce intelligence briefs, analyze documents, and create marketing content. AI-generated content is produced algorithmically and may contain errors, omissions, or inaccuracies.
terms.s6_2Body: IMPORTANT: AI-generated summaries, intelligence briefs, context notes, document analyses, and any other AI output provided through the Service do not constitute legal advice, medical advice, financial advice, therapeutic guidance, or professional counsel of any kind. All AI output is informational only and is intended to assist — not replace — the professional's own judgment, analysis, and expertise.
terms.s6_3Body: Professionals are solely responsible for reviewing AI-generated content before acting on it, making their own professional assessments, and ensuring their use of the Service complies with all applicable professional standards, licensing requirements, and ethical codes.
terms.s6_4Body: Blog posts and marketing content generated through the Service are created by AI based on your profession, specialties, and location. You are responsible for reviewing all generated content for accuracy, appropriateness, and compliance with advertising regulations applicable to your profession before publishing.
terms.s7intro: IMPORTANT: SoloSolutionsAI is a software tool only. Use of this Service does not create a professional-client relationship of any kind between SoloSolutionsAI and either the Professional or the Client. Specifically:
terms.s7b1: For attorneys: Use of the Service does not create an attorney-client relationship. Establishing such a relationship is the sole responsibility of the attorney in accordance with their jurisdiction's rules of professional conduct.
terms.s7b2: For therapists and counselors: The AI intake conversation does not constitute a therapeutic session, clinical assessment, or treatment. Establishing a therapeutic relationship is the sole responsibility of the licensed professional.
terms.s7b3: For social workers: The intake process does not constitute a social work assessment, intervention, or case management activity.
terms.s7b4: For healthcare and veterinary professionals: AI-generated intelligence briefs do not constitute medical or veterinary diagnoses, and should not be treated as clinical recommendations.
terms.s7b5: For financial professionals: The Service does not provide financial, tax, or insurance advice. All professional determinations are the responsibility of the licensed professional.
terms.s7b6: For all professions: Clients submitting intake information are prospective clients of the Professional, not clients of SoloSolutionsAI. The Professional is solely responsible for the professional relationship.
terms.s8intro: The Service allows Professionals to connect third-party services including HubSpot, Zapier, Make, custom webhook endpoints, and Calendly. By connecting a third-party integration:
terms.s8b1: You authorize SoloSolutionsAI to transmit intake data to the connected service as configured
terms.s8b2: You are solely responsible for the privacy, security, and compliance of data once it reaches the third-party service
terms.s8b3: You acknowledge that third-party services are governed by their own terms of service and privacy policies
terms.s8b4: You are responsible for informing your clients that their data may be shared with third-party services and obtaining any required consent
terms.s8b5: SoloSolutionsAI is not liable for data breaches, misuse, or policy violations by third-party services
terms.s9intro: The Service allows Professionals to request documents from Clients, which Clients may upload voluntarily. By using this feature:
terms.s9b1: AI Analysis: Uploaded documents are processed by AI to generate structured summaries for the requesting Professional. These summaries are informational only and do not constitute professional analysis or advice.
terms.s9b2: No Human Review: No employee, contractor, or representative of SoloSolutionsAI views, reads, or reviews uploaded documents. All processing is fully automated.
terms.s9b3: Limited Retention: Uploaded documents and AI summaries are automatically deleted 30 days after upload. SoloSolutionsAI is not a document storage service.
terms.s9b4: Access Control: Documents are accessible only to the Professional who requested them. Documents are encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest (AES-256).
terms.s9b5: Deletion Rights: Clients may request immediate deletion of uploaded documents at any time by contacting privacy@solosolutionsai.com.
terms.s9p1: Professional Responsibility: Professionals are responsible for ensuring that requesting, receiving, and storing client documents complies with all applicable professional conduct rules, confidentiality obligations, and data protection laws in their jurisdiction.
terms.s10p1: You retain ownership of all data you input into the Service. By using the Service, you grant us a limited, non-exclusive license to process your data solely to provide, maintain, and improve the Service. We do not claim ownership of your intake data, documents, or generated content.
terms.s10p2: AI-generated content (summaries, intelligence briefs, blog posts, marketing copy) created through the Service is provided to you for your use. You may use, modify, and publish this content as you see fit, subject to your professional and legal obligations.
terms.s11Body: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED. WE DO NOT WARRANT THAT THE SERVICE WILL BE UNINTERRUPTED, ERROR-FREE, SECURE, OR FREE OF HARMFUL COMPONENTS. WE DO NOT WARRANT THE ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS, OR RELIABILITY OF ANY AI-GENERATED CONTENT. WE DO NOT PROVIDE LEGAL, MEDICAL, FINANCIAL, OR PROFESSIONAL ADVICE OF ANY KIND.
terms.s12p1: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, SOLOSOLUTIONSAI AND ITS OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AND AGENTS SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO: LOSS OF REVENUE, LOSS OF DATA, LOSS OF CLIENTS, PROFESSIONAL LIABILITY CLAIMS, OR REGULATORY ACTIONS ARISING FROM USE OF THE SERVICE.
terms.s12p2: OUR TOTAL LIABILITY FOR ANY CLAIMS ARISING UNDER THESE TERMS SHALL NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNT YOU PAID FOR THE SERVICE IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM.
terms.s13Body: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless SoloSolutionsAI from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, costs, or expenses (including reasonable attorney's fees) arising from: (a) your use of the Service; (b) your violation of these Terms; (c) your violation of any applicable law or regulation; (d) your violation of any professional or ethical obligation; or (e) any claim by a third party (including your clients) related to your use of the Service or data shared through integrations you have configured.
terms.s14p1: You may cancel your subscription and close your account at any time. Upon cancellation, your access continues through the end of your current billing period.
terms.s14p2: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account for violation of these Terms, fraudulent activity, or any reason with reasonable notice. In the event of termination, we will provide you with a reasonable opportunity to export your data.
terms.s14p3: Upon account deletion, we will delete your account information, intake records, and associated data from our systems, subject to any legal retention requirements and our data retention policy.
terms.s15Body: We may modify these Terms at any time. We will notify registered Professionals of material changes by email at least 30 days before the changes take effect. Continued use of the Service after the effective date of changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. If you do not agree with the revised Terms, you must stop using the Service and close your account.
terms.s16p1: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Florida, United States, without regard to conflict of law provisions.
terms.s16p2: Any dispute arising under these Terms shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of the American Arbitration Association, conducted in the State of Florida. You agree to waive any right to a jury trial or to participate in a class action.
terms.s17b1: Entire Agreement: These Terms, together with the Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and SoloSolutionsAI.
terms.s17b2: Severability: If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.
terms.s17b3: Waiver: Failure to enforce any provision of these Terms does not constitute a waiver of that provision.
terms.s17b4: Assignment: You may not assign or transfer your rights under these Terms without our written consent. We may assign our rights and obligations without restriction.
terms.s18intro: Questions about these Terms? Contact us at:
blog.headerSubtitle: Insights on AI, client onboarding, lead generation, and growing your practice.
blog.ctaTitle: Ready to modernize your intake process?
blog.ctaBody: Join the waitlist and be first to try AI-powered client onboarding.
cookie.message: We use cookies to improve your experience. By continuing to browse, you agree to our use of cookies.
